results.title: Ulsan Expands Packaging Subsidy for Small Restaurant Operators
results.description: Ulsan expands its packaging material subsidy for small restaurant operators, raising the eligibility ceiling to 500 million won in annual revenue, with applications opening May 29.

results.title: 2028 jostling won’t save NDC if Mahama government fails – Felix Kwakye Ofosu
results.description: Government spokesperson Felix Kwakye Ofosu has cautioned that early jostling within the NDC over who succeeds President John Mahama will count for little if the government fails to deliver for Ghanaians.

results.title: The Neural Basis of Thought Symbols Identified for the First Time
results.description: Researchers have discovered the first evidence of the neural substrates that underlie the basic units of thought. They located this activity in the ventral premotor cortex, which appears to mediate between the prefrontal cortex, where higher-level thinking occurs, and the motor cortex, which enables movement. The findings illuminate fundamental properties of neural function and have implications for improving computer-brain interfaces and studying brain disorders.
